message:
chore(agent): add ubs:ignore annotations on API key unwrap_or_default calls

These two call sites in AgentSession intentionally use unwrap_or_default()
on the API key option to fall back to empty-string when no key is configured
(the downstream provider handles missing keys with its own error). UBS
flagged them as potential panics, but the behavior is correct — annotate
with ubs:ignore to suppress the false-positive findings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
